label: Dry skin or xerosis without infection or systemic symptoms
inclusion_criteria: Adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated dry skin or xerosis.
No secondary infection, severe eczema/psoriasis pathway, severe cutaneous adverse reaction, systemic illness, high-risk host, or specialist-directed plan.
exclusion_criteria: Cellulitis, abscess, pus, bleeding fissures requiring wound care, systemic illness, severe itch with widespread rash, or severe cutaneous adverse reaction.
Severe eczema/psoriasis flare, immunocompromised host, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed dermatology plan.
default_follow_up: Follow up with primary care or dermatology if symptoms persist, recur, or become severe.

source_audit.notes: MedlinePlus supports dry-skin/xerosis framing, moisturizers, gentle skin care, avoiding drying triggers, and escalation for cracks that bleed, infection signs, severe itching, or non-improvement. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated dry skin/xerosis without infection, severe eczema/psoriasis pathway, severe cutaneous adverse reaction, systemic illness, high-risk host, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed dermatology plan.

review.notes: Reviewed as a narrow production ontology phenotype. MedlinePlus supports dry-skin/xerosis framing, moisturizers, gentle skin care, avoiding drying triggers, and escalation for cracks that bleed, infection signs, severe itching, or non-improvement. Autonomous Phase 1701-1750 approved this narrow v1 only for clinician-diagnosed uncomplicated dry skin/xerosis without infection, severe eczema/psoriasis pathway, severe cutaneous adverse reaction, systemic illness, high-risk host, pregnancy/pediatric pathway, or specialist-directed dermatology plan.
required_modifiers: adult with clinician diagnosis or discharge impression of uncomplicated dry skin or xerosis
no cellulitis, secondary infection, fever, systemic symptoms, or systemic illness documented
no severe eczema/psoriasis, severe drug-rash, high-risk host, pregnancy, pediatric, or specialist-directed pathway
